title: Prayers of Rabia al-Adawiyya: Love Without Reward
description: Rabia, the first great female Sufi, who loved God purely — not for hope of paradise or fear of hell, but for God's own sake.
introduction: Rabia, the first great female Sufi, who loved God purely — not for hope of paradise or fear of hell, but for God's own sake.

translation.text: O God, if I worship You for fear of Hell, burn me in Hell. If I worship You in hope of Paradise, exclude me from Paradise. But if I worship You for Your own sake, do not grudge me Your everlasting beauty.
